channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI skills that pay: backend vs prompt skills in 2026
item.description: Backend AI skills pay 8-15% more than prompt skills in 2026 — benchmarked against Redis 7.2 and LangChain 0.1.12. See latency, cost, and salary differences.

item.title: Show salary, not screenshots: Africa dev portfolios
item.description: Portfolio flops when it’s just screenshots — real remote jobs in 2026 demand production artifacts: load tests, alerts, runbooks, cost reports. Learn the exact artifacts that got African engineers $70k+ remote offers.

item.title: Production RAG: the latency trap most tutorials miss
item.description: Cut RAG latency 86% and AWS bill 52% with article-level caching; the vector-store hop most tutorials ignore

item.title: Pool size too low? Blame TCP ports
item.description: Cut connection pool mistakes 80%: set max pool size to 1.5x concurrency, not database capacity — evidence from 3 production systems using PostgreSQL 15, Node.js 20, and Python FastAPI 0.109 in 2026

item.title: Why senior devs flee big tech's empty reviews
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech over code reviews, not stock — here’s the 4-step system that cut regressions 40% and saved $150k in outages

item.title: Choose the right real-time tech fast
item.description: Cut API response time 70% with the right real-time tool — SSE vs WebSockets vs long polling compared with 2026 benchmarks, code, and the mistake that cost 3 weeks

item.title: AI salary killers: LLMs vs vector search 2026
item.description: Cut AI stack costs 96% with vector search — Qdrant, Redis, and binary embeddings deliver the salary boost most engineers miss in 2026.

item.title: Nairobi devs: your portfolio is boring recruiters
item.description: Show recruiters you can handle production load — not just write code. Nairobi devs: build one system that proves you can own a problem end-to-end, deploy it on AWS, and include metrics recruiters care about.

item.title: Hidden RAG slowdowns: cache warms, reranker fails
item.description: Cut RAG latency 60% and AWS costs 88% — the invisible bottlenecks pipelines ignore and how to fix them with Redis 7.2, Node 20 LTS, and progressive delivery

item.title: Over-provisioned DB pools cost more than cores
item.description: Cut database latency 50% by ditching the CPU-cores rule for connection pools — real benchmarks, Aurora PostgreSQL 2026 limits, and the concurrency formula most teams ignore.

item.title: 42% discount: remote pay when you're overseas
item.description: Increase remote salary 74% by forcing recruiters to share their multiplier — real 2026 results, exact emails, and a Google Sheet to build your anchor in 30 minutes

item.title: Stop sizing DB pools by CPU cores
item.description: Then traffic spiked to 2,400 QPS during a Black Friday sale.

item.title: AI skills that move salaries in 2026
item.description: Cut AI salary gap 30-60% with MLOps pipelines. 2026 data-backed comparison of skills that move your paycheck, with concrete numbers, tool versions, and a 30-minute action step.

item.title: Haggle remote pay from $3k to $8k/month
item.description: Push remote pay from $3k to $8k/month using a repeatable salary benchmarking script and cost-of-living model that finance teams can’t ignore.

item.title: Ship one project, land remote from Africa
item.description: Land remote jobs from Africa by shipping one project that proves production ownership — cost, scale, and failure — not a portfolio of tutorials. $8.40/month system got five offers in six weeks.

item.title: RAG pipelines break at 10k docs — here’s why
item.description: Cut RAG latency 96% and halve embedding costs with Redis 7.2 hybrid search — the step most tutorials skip when docs exceed 10k

item.title: Compare 3 real-time tools in 50 words
item.description: Compare WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling with 2026 benchmarks, RAM costs, and the one proxy everyone forgets: corporate firewalls. Pick the right tool in 90 seconds.

item.title: Push updates without WebSockets: cheaper ways
item.description: Cut real-time feature costs 95 % with these 5 serverless stacks — benchmarked 2026 data, concrete costs, and the one I picked for a Figma-like editor

item.title: RAG pipelines: why staging lied
item.description: Cut RAG latency 72% and AWS costs 36% with mmap, Redis cache, and vLLM 0.5 — the production tricks tutorials skip

item.title: DB pools: CPU cores ×2 is wrong now
item.description: Cut DB response time 40% by sizing connection pools for downstream capacity, not CPU cores — PostgreSQL 16, Node.js 20, and RDS tuning guide.
